name: Shenzhen Topway Video Communication Co., Ltd
summary: Shenzhen Topway Video Communication Co., Ltd. constructs, operates, and maintains cable television (TV) networks that provide cable TV viewing and related value-added services in Shenzhen, China. It offers digital TV and broadband services. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Shenzhen, China. Shenzhen Topway Video Communication Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Shenzhen Media Group Co. Ltd.
